productName: Seattle Bubble Works Joint - DOH Medical: Hash Blunts - Super Lemon Haze (S) - .75g
description: A sativa infused blunt built around Super Lemon Haze and enhanced with extract, blended in for a smooth, even burn and an elevated experience. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of lemon, citrus, and lime, delivering an upbeat, talkative energy. Pace yourself.
